violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The slicer blade (outer edge) was not in good repair. Inspector observed blade chipped and no longer smooth and easily cleanable. Unit taken out of service and PIC ordered a new blade during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
